source.name: Get Randomized! PLAYER POINTS!  (Alpha)
source.description:
FIXED THE LEADERBOARD, YAY! 
Adding a shop hopefully soon!
22 BADGES TOTAL!
Version 15.5 - New Chat Voice, Points Saver.
 Awesome people that have played: ROBLOX, reesemcblox, KryptonikOfficial, PlayRobot, Jahrblox, and scoutywouty.

Recent Updates - No more lag or crashing, neater design, more colorful, more things to do, new tools, recolored, new hats, new clothes, and most importantly, more fun to play!
 ---------------------------------------------
10k gift: http://www.roblox.com/10k-item?id=82265696
Say try/# to be anyone you want!
 Heres the Instructions: When you spawn, go to the multi-colored teleporter behind HelperBot and touch it. After you've touched it, you should be fallling down a big wall that randomly alters your character. Ask the Dialog Guy in the game for further information! Thanks!
